summary: Completed comprehensive testing of YEPEZ CONTROLS motorcycle service center system. All backend APIs (17/17 tests passed) and frontend functionality verified working correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ Admin login with admin@yepezcontrols.com / Admin2026! redirects to /admin
✅ Dashboard shows interactive charts (Ingresos de la Semana, Servicios por Estado)
✅ Dashboard stats cards display correctly (Ingresos Hoy, Servicios Activos, Mecánicos Activos, Stock Bajo)
✅ Finances (Caja) page loads with PDF/Excel export buttons
✅ Finances shows Total Ingresos, Efectivo, Transferencias in MXN
✅ Inventory page loads and shows items with stats
✅ Plate tracking works from landing page (ABC123 shows 75% progress)
✅ API /api/reports/sales/export responds correctly for PDF/Excel data
✅ WhatsApp integration implemented with CallMeBot API (logs on mechanic assignment)
✅ All 17 backend API tests passed (100% success rate)
critical_code_review_comments: WhatsApp integration requires valid CallMeBot apikey for each mechanic - currently 'Fabian Prueba' has apikey '5468589' but may not be valid
PDF/Excel export is generated client-side using jspdf and xlsx libraries - working correctly
seed_data_creation: Admin user already exists (admin@yepezcontrols.com). Test data includes: 1 inventory item (Aceite Motor 20W-50), 3 services, 2 mechanics, weekly cuts history.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features working. WhatsApp notifications require valid CallMeBot apikey. PDF/Excel exports are client-side generated. Plate tracking ABC123 shows 75% progress with VENTO 150 vehicle.

features_verified.landing_page: ✅ Loads with YEPEZ CONTROLS branding, services section, tracking section
features_verified.login: ✅ Admin login works with provided credentials
features_verified.dashboard: ✅ Interactive Recharts graphs (AreaChart, PieChart, BarChart) working
features_verified.finances: ✅ Caja page with PDF/Excel export, payment stats in MXN
features_verified.inventory: ✅ Item management with stats and export options
features_verified.plate_tracking: ✅ Public tracking shows service status and progress
features_verified.whatsapp: ✅ Integration code present, sends on mechanic assignment
